name: Crab and Avocado Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive Oil or Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and finely chop the Jalapeno chiles.
2. In a large bowl, combine the crab meat, chopped avocados, chopped tomatoes, lime juice, olive oil or vegetable oil, chopped onion, snipped cilantro, finely chopped garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the finely chopped jalapeno chiles to the mixture.
4. Fold in the finely chopped lettuce until well combined.
5. Serve with lemon or lime wedges on the side.
